name: Shield of Far Sight
description: A {@creature mind flayer} skilled at crafting magic items creates a shield of far sight by harvesting an eye from an intelligent humanoid and magically implanting it on the outer surface of a nonmagical shield. The shield becomes a magic item once the eyes is implanted, whereupon the {@creature mind flayer} can give the shield to a thrall or hang it on a wall in its lair. As long as the shield is on the same plane of existence as its creator, the {@creature mind flayer} can see through the shiel
